Authors and Citation

Authors

somatemplate is proudly brought to you by:

  • Roberto Cardenas Retamal. Author, maintainer.

🧬

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Cardenas Retamal R (2026). JPselect: Just-Pope Production Functions with Heckman Selectivity Correction. R package version 0.1.0, https://github.com/YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME/JPselect. 

@Manual{,
  title = {JPselect: Just-Pope Production Functions with Heckman Selectivity Correction},
  author = {Roberto {Cardenas Retamal}},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.1.0},
  url = {https://github.com/YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME/JPselect},
}

Koundouri P, Nauges C (2005). “On Production Function Estimation with Selectivity and Risk Considerations.” Journal of Agricultural and Resource Economics, 30(3), 597–608. 

@Article{,
  title = {On Production Function Estimation with Selectivity and Risk Considerations},
  author = {Phoebe Koundouri and Celine Nauges},
  journal = {Journal of Agricultural and Resource Economics},
  year = {2005},
  volume = {30},
  number = {3},
  pages = {597--608},
}

On this page
